evidence.snippet: We specialize in the design and fabrication of Unmanned Air Vehicles and related airborne electronic subsystem components required for telemetry, command, and control.
Our telemetry systems provide high-reliability, long range communication to and from unmanned airborne platforms and space based satellites.

items.notes: Antenna systems, airborne PCM telemetry (DRV Series), airborne voice relay, and RF amplifiers.

evidence.snippet: Aero Telemetry has provided several different types and styles of Parachute Recovery Systems that have been implemented on many different unmanned air vehicle projects.

The most complex system on any airplane in the retractable landing gear.
Aero Telemetry has designed and manufactured hydraulically actuated  landing gear systems for several unique unmanned air vehicle projects for more than 25 years

items.notes: Recovery parachute systems (Cross-X Series) and hydraulically actuated UAV landing gear.

evidence.snippet: Aero Telemetry designs and manufactures flight termination and vehicle recovery parachute systems for many applications. The Cross-X Series™ of high-speed canopies are Commercial Off The Shelf stock items.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells named product lines (telemetry systems, antenna systems, recovery parachutes, landing gear) as drone subsystems; also provides custom UAV design as an engineering service.

items.name: DRV Series™
items.product_type: airborne PCM telemetry data link system

evidence.snippet: The Aero Telemetry DRV Series™ airborne PCM telemetry data link was designed specifically for use on Unmanned Air Vehicles. This entry level integrated air-flight data package provides UAV operators with a reliable and cost effective telemetry downlink.

items.notes: Models include DRV-1000, DRV-2000, DRV-3000, DRV-4000 (10–40 channel variants).

items.name: Cross-X Series™
items.product_type: high-speed flight termination and vehicle recovery parachute system

evidence.snippet: Aero Telemetry designs and manufactures flight termination and vehicle recovery parachute systems for many applications. The Cross-X Series™ of high-speed canopies are Commercial Off The Shelf stock items.

items.notes: COTS catalog items; variants P-10N ($595) through P-20N ($2395) for 20–200 lb airframes.

items.name: Airborne Voice Relay
items.product_type: airborne ATC voice communication relay system

evidence.snippet: Originally developed for the Predator UAV our  Airborne voice communication relay system is used to allow ATC personnel to communicate directly with the remote operator of the UAV on Standard commercial Air Traffic Frequencies.

items.name: Antenna Systems

evidence.snippet:
[AIRBORNE INSTRUMENTATION](https://www.aerotelemetry.com/antenna-systems)
*   Miniature Airborne L/S-Band Blade Antenna
*   Airborne L/S-Band Blade Antenna
*   Airborne Broadband Flush-Mounted Antennas
*   Airborne GPS Antennas
*   Airborne UHF/L Band Blade

items.notes: Families include omni-directional base station, airborne blade antennas, broadband flush-mount, UHF/L-Band, directional parabolic, GPS.

tagline: Manufactures airborne PCM telemetry data links (DRV Series), flight-termination parachute systems (Cross-X Series), UAV landing gear, antennas, and RF amplifiers for unmanned systems. Also offers recovery parachutes and ATC voice relay. Production-ready subsystems across communications and mechanical integration. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of programs and customer base is limited.
